name: push_in_hero
description: Classic emotional push-in. Camera starts at medium distance and slowly dollies toward the hero over the full shot length. 45mm lens so features stay natural. Wraps the existing V1.1 `hero_push_in` preset, extended with the shot-type hint so Phase 5 can drive the `camera_push_in` motion profile.

metadata.author: team
metadata.inspiration: Spielberg reveal pushes; Denis Villeneuve hero intros
